results.title: Growth rate dependence of permeability and percolation threshold of young sea ice (Faraday Discussions 2025)
results.judge_reason: Directly addresses source-domain percolation threshold and permeability in sea ice, highly relevant to brine-channel network percolation.

results.title: The Percolation Phase Transition in Sea Ice (Science)
results.judge_reason: Classic Science reference on sea-ice percolation phase transition, foundational source-side citation.

results.title: The golden rule of sea ice permeability (Australian Antarctic Program)
results.judge_reason: Authoritative source on the 5% golden rule for sea-ice permeability threshold, central to source-domain claim.

results.title: Understanding Mixture of Experts (MoE) Neural Networks (IntuitionLabs 2025)
results.judge_reason: General MoE background relevant to llm-side expert activation framing but not directly bridging percolation.

results.title: Machine Learning Percolation Model (2101.08928)
results.judge_reason: ML applied to percolation systems but not MoE-specific or bridging to sparse routing.

results.title: Identifying internal patterns in (1+1)-D directed percolation using neural networks
results.judge_reason: NN for percolation pattern detection; not MoE percolation nor sea-ice brine.

results.title: Siamese NN for Label-Efficient Critical Phenomena Prediction in 3D Percolation
results.judge_reason: NN predicting critical-phenomena percolation; tangential to MoE expert-activation percolation.

results.title: TT-LoRA MoE: PEFT + Sparse MoE (SC25)
results.judge_reason: Sparse MoE PEFT method; relevant to MoE sparsity but no percolation/phase-transition framing.
